objects.name: Analytic 1850
objects.description: Correlates (1) device posture changes indicating root or elevated privilege state, (2) runtime framework manipulation or injection into application processes, and (3) anomalous API behavior or suppressed security signals. The defender observes a causal chain where an application gains privileged execution context, interacts with system frameworks (e.g., ART/Zygote), and modifies expected API outputs or suppresses security-relevant signals such as permission checks, sensor access reporting, or process visibility.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: device transitions to non-compliant state + root detected or integrity attestation failure (SafetyNet/Play Integrity)

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: application process loads external code modules or injects into runtime (zygote/app_process) + abnormal library loading or method interception behavior

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Defines correlation window between root detection, runtime manipulation, and anomalous API behavior
Baseline of known applications that legitimately use instrumentation or debugging frameworks
Determines whether suspicious API manipulation must occur in background to increase fidelity
Defines which attestation signals (Play Integrity, OEM attestation) are trusted in the environment
